_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: As authorized, train cyberspace operators at one’s certification level or below.
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain AI security standards for the enterprise, including training data provenance requirements, model registry controls, and LLM application security requirements.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-010 (RC, cosine: 0.415), DA-S-004 (DA, cosine: 0.410).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.4/10 (raw 0.244). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [authorized, certification, cyberspace, level, one, operators] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, application, controls, data, develop, enterprise] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.848 (P=0.850, R=0.846). Balanced P/R — the 11-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.1%, N:62.4%, C:37.6%). No dominant classification for "As authorized, train cyberspace operators at one’s certification level or below." vs "Develop and maintain AI security standards for the enterprise, including trainin" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.422 > STS 0.244 (gap +0.179). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [authorized, certification, cyberspace, level, one, operators]. WIDAI terms: [ai, application, controls, data, develop, enterprise].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.179 with low STS 0.244. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
